overview.short: Adi Kesava Temple (also called Ramanujar Temple) is dedicated to Hindu god Vishnu located in Sriperumbudur, Kanchipuram district, in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Adi Kesava Temple (also called Ramanujar Temple) is dedicated to Hindu god Vishnu located in Sriperumbudur, Kanchipuram district, in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, Vishnu, who is worshipped as Adi Kesava, and his consort Lakshmi as Ethiraja Nadhavalli. The temple is believed to be the birthplace of Ramanuja, the exponent of Vishishtadvaita philosophy. The gold plated shrine in front of the hall of Ramanuja was built by the Maharaja of Mysore.

topPlaces.name: Sriperumbudur
topPlaces.description: Sriperumbudur, also known as Thiruperumbudur, is a town located in Kanchipuram district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located 40 kilometers southwest of the capital city of Chennai on the National Highway 4, it falls under the Chennai Metropolitan Area.

topPlaces.name: Assassination of Rajiv Gandhi
topPlaces.description: The assassination of Rajiv Gandhi, former prime minister of India, occurred as a result of a suicide bombing in Sriperumbudur in Tamil Nadu, India on 21 May 1991. At least 14 others, in addition to Rajiv Gandhi and the assassin, were killed.

topPlaces.name: Rajiv Gandhi Memorial
topPlaces.description: Rajiv Gandhi Memorial is a memorial to the former Indian prime minister Rajiv Gandhi in Chennai, India. The memorial is located at Sriperumpudur at the site where he was assassinated on 21 May 1991.

topPlaces.name: Uchimedu
topPlaces.description: Uchimedu (Tamil: உச்சிமேடு) is a village in the Cuddalore district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Madras International Circuit
topPlaces.description: The Madras International Circuit (MIC, previously known as Madras Motor Race Track and Irungattukottai Race Track) is a permanent motor racing circuit located in Irungattukottai, Chennai, India. It was built in the late 1980s and was inaugurated in 1990.

topPlaces.name: Irungattukottai
topPlaces.description: Irungattukottai is a fast emerging neighbourhood of Chennai, strategically on the Chennai-Bangalore Highway (NH4). It is approximately 34 km from downtown Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Thandalam, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Thandalam is an emerging location of the Chennai city in the Sriperumbudur taluk of Kancheepuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is in the National Highway 4 (NH-4) or State Highway 84 (SH-84) at Sira Bypass.

topPlaces.name: Malaipattu
topPlaces.description: Malaipattu is a neighbourhood in Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu state in India.

items.note: Sriperumbudur, also known as Thiruperumbudur, is a town located in Kanchipuram district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located 40 kilometers southwest of the capital city of Chennai on the National Highway 4, it falls under the Chennai Metropolitan Area.

The assassination of Rajiv Gandhi, former prime minister of India, occurred as a result of a suicide bombing in Sriperumbudur in Tamil Nadu, India on 21 May 1991. At least 14 others, in addition to Rajiv Gandhi and the assassin, were killed.
Rajiv Gandhi Memorial is a memorial to the former Indian prime minister Rajiv Gandhi in Chennai, India. The memorial is located at Sriperumpudur at the site where he was assassinated on 21 May 1991.
Uchimedu (Tamil: உச்சிமேடு) is a village in the Cuddalore district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

The Madras International Circuit (MIC, previously known as Madras Motor Race Track and Irungattukottai Race Track) is a permanent motor racing circuit located in Irungattukottai, Chennai, India. It was built in the late 1980s and was inaugurated in 1990.
Irungattukottai is a fast emerging neighbourhood of Chennai, strategically on the Chennai-Bangalore Highway (NH4). It is approximately 34 km from downtown Chennai.

Thandalam is an emerging location of the Chennai city in the Sriperumbudur taluk of Kancheepuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is in the National Highway 4 (NH-4) or State Highway 84 (SH-84) at Sira Bypass.
Malaipattu is a neighbourhood in Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu state in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Adikesava Perumal temple, Sriperumpudur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Adikesava Perumal temple, Sriperumpudur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Adikesava Perumal temple, Sriperumpudur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (24 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (38 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Adikesava Perumal temple, Sriperumpudur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Adikesava Perumal temple, Sriperumpudur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Adikesava Perumal temple, Sriperumpudur?
faq.a: Stays in Adikesava Perumal temple, Sriperumpudur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Adikesava Perumal temple, Sriperumpudur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sriperumbudur, Assassination of Rajiv Gandhi, Rajiv Gandhi Memorial, Uchimedu, Madras International Circuit.
